question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Glorioso Islands will be higher on each resolution date listed below than on 2025-08-17?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.61968.D once the data is published.

The exact value on 2025-08-17 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-08-07) was 24.475. (The daily average temperature at the French weather station at Glorioso Islands.)
background: The history of Average temperature by day and by station for France - Degree Celsius - GLORIEUSES - Daily from Météo-France is available at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.61968.D.
